programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Just days before Christmas, an LA real-estate lawyer and his eleven-year-old son magically swap bodies. As they walk in each other's shoes, the father and son rediscover what it means to be family.

programme.title: Caillou's Holiday Movie
programme.desc: It's winter time at Caillou's house and the inquisitive 4-year-old greets the season with his usual curiosity and enthusiasm.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago City, three criminals learn of the ninjas' absence and stage a breakout of Kryptarium Prison, telling tall tales of how they were captured as they go.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd and his wolf companion find a cave with the mech inside and a message from Zane that provides a clue to his fate.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Guilt-ridden over having lost the Traveler's Tea, Cole embarks on a dangerous quest to the top of a nearby mountain in hopes of finding the legendary Traveler's Tree, a tree which is supposedly guarded by a fearsome beast.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Cole awakens inside an icy cavern belonging to a legendary beast and attempts to escape, only to discover a surprising truth.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ice Emperor summons an enormous ice behemoth to attack Lloyd and his faithful wolf companion.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Akita tells the story of the Choosing and how she and her twin brother, Kataru, went into the wilds to discover their animal forms.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ice Emperor's terrible Ice Dragon strikes again and lays waste to the Ice Fisher's village, forcing the ninjas to go after Lloyd.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago City, Wu and Pixal attempt to locate the Never-Realm and accidentally unleash a dreaded creature from the Departed Realm.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The story of Zane's arrival in the Never-Realm and how he fell under the sway of the villainous Vex.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Having discovered the terrible truth of Zane's fate, Lloyd finds himself imprisoned and alone in the clutches of the Ice Emperor.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya, Jay, Cole and Kai face off against the Ice Emperor's dreaded dragon, while Lloyd and his newfound allies, Kataru and Grimfax, confront the Ice Emperor himself.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The dramatic conclusion of the Never-Realm saga, in which old friends are reunited and the power of friendship is pitted against the corrupting power of the Scroll of Forbidden Spinjitzu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: While investigating a heist, the ninja discover Prime Empire, an unreleased arcade game that suddenly takes control of all other games in Ninjago

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: When the ninja connect Jay's disappearance to Prime Empire, they set out to Dyer Island to seek answers from the game's designer, Milton Dyer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cyrus Borg discovers a secret about Prime Empire while the ninja battle an escaped Mechanic in an attempt to reach Level Thirteen and enter the game.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Inside Prime Empire, the ninja are in unfamiliar territory, ignorant of the rules, as they try to find Zane and escape Unagami's Red Visors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Inside one of the game zones, a Samurai named Okino faces a crisis of faith when he fails to lead a series of Masters to victory.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to stop Unagami, the ninja must obtain 3 Key-tanas, the first of which is hidden in Terra Karana–one of the most dangerous game environments.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja climb the 'Cliffs of Hysteria and discover that Unagami is converting players into energy cubes to build a portal into the real world.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Still in the game zone Terra Karana, Okino has to choose between helping his allies the ninja, or obeying the evil orders of his Master, Unagami.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja learn that the only way to acquire the 2nd Key-tana is by winning a race in Terra Technica and have to find racing cars in unexpected ways

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: As the ninja prepare for the brutal Speedway Five-Billion race, Lloyd meets a race driver named Seven who may hold the key to victory.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Unagami's soldiers, the Red Visors, finally discover the secret location of Scott's garage and attack the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Our ninja barely have time to mourn the loss of their fallen ninja friends before being thrust into the madness of Terra Domina.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago City, Zane and Pixal hit the mean streets to track down Milton Dyer, only to discover that things are not what they seem...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Zane, kidnapped by the Mechanic, faces Unagami while Pixal questions Milton Dyer for information on how to shut down Prime Empire.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay must stand alone against Unagami in the end-game, yet Unagami has a bigger battle in facing the truth about his own identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Unagami breaks into the real world and terrorizes Ninjago City while Jay, Zane and Pixal attempt to prevent disaster by reuniting Unagami with Dyer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja are invited to attend the birthday party of Princess Vania in the Kingdom of Shintaro. They bring along Master Wu who is feeling his age.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Princess Vania reveals a secret entrance that leads to an underground mine beneath Shintaro where the city's dark secrets are held.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja attempt to rescue Cole, but the bickering of his fellow prisoners alerts the Skull Sorcerer, and soon the ninja are prisoners too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: In order to escape the Skull Sorcerer's chain-gang, the ninja must convince the Munce and Geckles to put aside their distrust and work together.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Jay, Nya and Lloyd are led into the Mines of Shintaro by Murt who brings them back to the Munce "Home-Cave". The Munce Queen takes a liking to Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: A party of Geckles suspect Kai and Zane of being in league with the Skull Sorcerer and bring them to their leader who subjects them to a Trial-By-Mino

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Separated from the others, Cole must find his way to the surface to alert King Vangelis of the dangerous Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: An entire episode chronicles how Cole, Princess Vania and Master Wu fall down a seemingly endless tunnel, into the bowels of Shintaro Mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Wu and Princess Vania befriend a motley group of survivors, called the Lowly, and are told the story of how they too ended up at "Rock-Bottom."

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Having joined forces with the Lowly in their quest to defeat King Vangelis, Cole, Wu, and Vania have to find a way out of the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Nya and Kai, who have become the leaders of the Munce and Geckles, try to unite the tribes and defeat their mutual enemy, the Skull Sorcerer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, Princess Vania, Wu & the Lowly arrive at a temple in Shintaro Mountain which was once a training ground for Earth Elementals incl. Cole's mother

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The ninja, the Munce and the Geckles take refuge in the Geckle Strong-Cave about to confront the Skull Sorcerer and Grief-Bringer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole, the Lowly, Princess Vania and Wu blast their way out of the mountain to confront the evil Skull Sorcerer!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: Cole and the Upply arrive to rescue Lloyd and the ninja. To do so, Cole will need to retrieve his mother's fabled swords, the Blades of Deliverance.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Prime Empire
programme.desc: The battle for the fate of Shintaro Mountain concludes!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: An expedition led by Misako, Master Wu and Clutch Powers goes missing while exploring an uncharted island and the ninja must pick up their trail...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Having survived their journey to the island, the ninja venture inland, where they unexpectedly befriend a dragon and are ambushed by living statues!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja find themselves captured by the 'Keepers of the Amulet', who seem to be treating Jay particularly well. Meanwhile, Lloyd stages a rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: As Jay is sacrificed to the sea serpent that terrorizes the island, the other ninja begin to suspect events on the island are not all as they seem...

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: When Nya loses control of her elemental powers, the ninja must search for answers, which may lie with the former Master of Water – Nya's mother.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya's mother, Maya, arrives with advice on how to regain control of Nya's powers. Meanwhile, Zane and Pixal discover that something else may be behind the disturbances.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja embark on a mission to uncover the source of a mysterious power signal that is disrupting marine life and Nya's powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and Maya discover the source of the energy pulse that has been disrupting Nya's powers and come face-to-face with a dangerous new villain.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and her mother Maya attempt to escape from the evil Prince Kalmaar, who schemes to overthrow his father, the benevolent King Trimaar.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Prince Kalmaar deceives the Merlopians and turns the ninja into fugitives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Aided by Benthomaar, the ninja fight their way through the palace to the Hydro Bounty and must escape Kalmaar's forces.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The tragic tale of Benthomaar is revealed, a tale filled with treachery, betrayal, but also with a glimmer of hope.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and the ninja race to obtain the Storm Amulet before Prince Kalmaar can get it and use it to awaken the doomsday serpent, Wojira.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: In NINJAGO City, Wu, Cole, Kai, Ray, and Misako must infiltrate the Explorer's Club and recover the Storm Amulet before King Kalmaar and his troops.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Prince Kalmaar attacks NINJAGO City to obtain the Storm Amulet, but he runs into an unexpected obstacle: a determined young papergirl.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya learns the history of the Storm Amulet. Meanwhile, Wu, Kai, Cole, Ray, and Misako try to prevent King Kalmaar from escaping the city with the Storm Amulet.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Kalmaar awakens Wojira and sets his sights on the destruction of NINJAGO City.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.desc: A mentally ill college student participating in experimental drug research becomes a suspect in a janitor's murder.

programme.desc: The FBI intervenes in the detectives' investigation of the attempted murder of an African-American Congress leader.

programme.desc: Gossip flies about Caroline and a man (Gil Gerard) building her kitchen in exchange for room and board.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary plans to meet a shy suitor at the Mankato Fair, until she encounters his charming balloonist boss.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Caroline recalls her first meeting with Charles when he is late for their wedding anniversary celebration.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an “International Fair” on the playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Valentino celebra el peor cumpleaños por culpa de la Sala Tornado. Desenmascaran a Queen quien saca su furia. Un Ex cae en una venganza tramada. Dos estrenan la Love Suite. Diana y Fershy arruinan la fiesta peleando y alguien debe partir de la villa.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Fershy decide quien se va, entre Beni y Alba. La Sala Tornado cocina una venganza que los hará tambalear a todos. Lilian explora con Alba y Bryan mientras que Asaf aprovecha con Valeria. En la nueva habitacion hay sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las peleas en la Villa no cesan. Asaf prueba más labios y el corazon de Lilian se parte. Más Ex se van mientras que la ultima en llegar, espera en la Love Suite. La Sala Tornado llama a Brandon y repite la historia, pero ahora con Queen.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the salesman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A maid is accused of killing an employer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When a member of the Law Club disappears, it becomes apparent that each of the students in Matlock's law class had a motive. Matlock wonders if he taught someone how to commit the perfect crime, and sets out to discover if it really was.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Grace Unger Maitland, a successful commercial producer is murdered, a disgruntled director, Peter Angelli takes the rap. Despite Michelle Thomas’ pleas, Matlock will not take the case – he’s got a house to paint

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A chemist has developed a miracle hair restorer. He cons a man into swiping the multi-million dollar formula so that he can then sell it out from underneath his employers. Murder ensues and the man finds himself in a "hairy" situation.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock goes head-to-head with a millionaire bent on revenge. Ben has to get inside the mind of a diabolical killer to avenge the death of his best friend.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is confronted with a dilemma. He knows his client, Phyllis Todd, is innocent of murder, but he strongly suspects she has allowed herself to be accused of the crime to protect her daughter.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.desc: Calvin's mother Sheila says that Calvin and Sylvia's baby isn't his! Sylvia wants to prove her wrong! Plus, Amber had a miscarriage and is pregnant again, but suspect he's still cheating! Is he also hurting their daughter?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Solo has a few things he needs to tell his best friend and girlfriend, Vixen. Next Cheryl caught her boyfriend, Nick, in bed with another woman. Later Lonnie's wife, Kim, is having an affair with their 18-year-old friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. She got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant."

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: "Psychic Lover" is a phony psychic who convinces women that their boyfriends are cheating so that he can then start having affairs with them. Later Marcus cheated on his girlfriend, Latoria, with her mother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Regina tells her daughter, Angela, that she is getting married to her ex-boyfriend! Next Suzanne is tired of her boyfriend complaining about her job as an exotic entertainer. Then Tanya is here to tell Bryan's wife about their affair.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carl is here today to tell his girlfriend that he's been sleeping with her sworn enemy, Keisha. Next Donte will tell his best friend, Quincy, that he's sleeping with his fiancé. Later Janel and Nikkie are fighting over the same man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts up a valiant fight in order to keep his word to Sanji! But will he be able to last until Sanji arrives at the rendezvous? Meanwhile, Jimbei shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Luffy meet finally - and while he is happy to feed Luffy to replenish his energy, Sanji's explanation of what actions he must take baffles Luffy! The crucial decision, to turn his back on his friends or his family, tears Sanji apart!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The newly reunited Luffy and Sanji hear from the rest of the Straw Hats in the mirror dimension! Then, Jimbei starts telling them about Capone "Gang" Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats put Jimbei's plan into action and approach Bege with the possibility of an alliance. But before they are granted an audience, they must make themselves presentable!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The proposed alliance between the Straw Hats and Bege unfolds! A gaseous blast from the past, Gastino, a member of Bege's team, reveals the secret weapon that the team plans to use against the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now, the assassination plan of Big Mom is all set and everyone starts preparing for the Tea Party. Montd'Or finds one of his crewmates, Bobbin the Disposer, dead, and suspects Sanji and Luffy of the crime.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day has arrived! Guests from the criminal underground pour in droves, but some have their own agendas to settle! Big Mom's sons, however, stand in their way and show them what they've got! Meanwhile, Luffy is preparing for his own plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Final preparations abound on all sides and multiple plots start to come together! But can Sanji keep his nerve and go through with the plan? Or will Pudding's beauty prove too enchanting?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All plans go into action as the moment of the wedding arrives - but as the veil is lifted on Pudding's grotesque face, all hell breaks loose and unexpected circumstances mean chaos at the altar! Meanwhile, Luffy charges in, adding to the mayhem!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is launched! Big Mom falls to pieces as the wedding - and the wedding cake - are destroyed and a slew of Luffys are wreaking havoc around the site. But just when Luffy gets in trouble, Jimbei confronts Big Mom bravely!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is in full swing however - Big Mom is pushed past the edge of sanity and can't even bring herself to act. Meanwhile, her children make a move against Germa and Pudding takes up her original aim of killing Sanji!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plot is in full swing as Luffy dashes towards Big Mom to show her the broken portrait again! Sanji makes an effort to free his family and wins the respect of his sister, and Big Mom loses her wits!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The tragic and sad history of Big Mom is revealed! From abandonment, rescue, and again to ruin, Big Mom's voracious hunger has brought her into conflict with others from the very beginning!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Linlin enrages the Giants as she slays their respected warrior - but Mother throws herself on their mercy and begs for clemency for her beloved Linlin, forcing the troupe to leave Elbaph for good.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Linlin, destroyed at the disappearance of Mother, falls in with a new cohort and finds a reason to go on living, proving herself a mighty force to be reckoned with! The Straw Hats' plan goes awry, and all hope looks to be lost!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bege and the Straw Hats are on the defensive as the full force of Mom's troops are brought down on them! As they retreat into a fortress, Germa 66 springs in to action! However, Bege has bad news for his allied forces.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and Germa 66 are cornered in Bege's stronghold - with the full force of the Big Mom Pirates pinning them down, it's only a matter of time before their defenses crack. The only way out seems to be to make a break for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is executed to sneak the Straw Hats out of Big Mom's castle while hidden inside Bege! But the irascible Luffy can't resist getting in at least one punch against his foe! Meanwhile, the Tamate Box slips into the hands of some surprising agent!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The full might of the Big Mom Pirates proves too much for the Straw Hats and Germa 66. With no other options, they decide to turn and fight, even though it means their total annihilation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Whole Cake Chateau starts crumbling while everyone is trying to escape for their lives! Luffy and the others get away and move on to the next stage of their escape, which involves some parting of ways.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue their mad dash to the Sunny! As Big Mom rages, her underlings decide to turn her Hunger Pang attacks against the Straw Hats! The Whole Cake Island scrambles to remake the cake to calm down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kingbaum puts his life on the line ferrying the Straw Hats towards the Seducing Woods! But Big Mom's word trumps him in this terrifying forest, and soon enough she catches up! Meanwhile, Pudding puts her plan to rebuild the cake into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zeus pursues the Straw Hats as Nami keeps him occupied. She has a shocking surprise in store for him, however, that might stop Big Mom in her tracks! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper find the Shark Submerge in a strange situation.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom is relentless in her pursuit of the Straw Hats! Even being buried alive doesn't stop her! The plan to recreate the cake to stop her onslaught progresses, and Pudding's changeable heart confuses all those looking on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Mama's onslaught continues as Pudding keeps battling the contradictory urges in her head - to kill or kiss Sanji! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper are at Perospero's mercy - and are being reduced to sweetened versions of themselves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sandwiched between Big Mom and her advancing fleet, the only hope is the Sunny's Coup-de-Burst! But can the Straw Hats prepare it in time? Meanwhile, Pedro comes face to face with his past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The last chance the Straw Hats have is the Coup de Burst! Pedro has made the ultimate sacrifice to give them this one chance to escape, but Big Mom's naval forces are closing in and poised to knock them out!

programme.title: The Closer

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz work together when a case turns into a murder investigation involving drug trafficking at gay dance parties. But Brenda's tactics aren't quite FBI protocol.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A former gang banger's murder leads Brenda to Father Jack (MARK ROLSTON - "Cold Case"), a community leader in a neighborhood upset with the LAPD. Brenda must rectify the situation.

programme.title: The Closer

programme.title: The Closer

programme.title: The Closer

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A confessed murderer gets details of the crime wrong during his allocution, causing Brenda to reopen the case. SOSIE BACON (Sedgwick's daughter) guest stars as Brenda's niece.

programme.title: The Closer

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A former college football player is stabbed during a fundraiser. Frost's mother visits with unexpected news. Lt. Col. Casey Jones (CHRIS VANCE) reveals startling news of his own.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Dr. Hope Martin (SHARON LAWRENCE) returns to ask Maura for a life-altering favor, and a building collapses, trapping loved ones inside.

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers: Richard Kuklinski

programme.title: Bizarre Murders

programme.title: Bizarre Murders

programme.title: Bizarre Murders

programme.title: Bizarre Murders

programme.title: Almost Unsolved

programme.title: Almost Unsolved
programme.desc: The body of a man is discovered in a pool of blood on a dirt road. Without any witnesses and only one potential suspect it will be years before technology allows the killer to be found.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators

programme.title: Forensic Investigators
programme.desc: The body of 22-year-old Tasmanian Amanda Carter was found alongside the Derwent River. It took 13 years and a revolution in forensic science to finally bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators
programme.desc: After a caravan park manager goes missing, police uncover an incredible tale of infidelity, drugs, and conspiracy to murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos van en busca de un Pokémon de gran tamaño, pero cuando caen ante un truco del Equipo Rocket, y luego Pikachu y Meowth son secuestrados por un Pidgeot gigante, ¡todos deben trabajar juntos para recuperarlos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de escuchar hablar de Ash por el Líder de Gimnasio de Isla Trovita, otro Entrenador lo busca para una batalla… y, tras ver derrotado a Pïkachu, Ash utiliza a Charizard. Pero ¿logrará que el Pokémon rebelde lo escuche?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los planes de nuestros héroes se ven interrumpidos por un incendio devastador en una casa cercana. Cuando intentan combatir las llamas, pronto requieren al departamento de bomberos local: ¡el Equipo Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando la Pokébola de Snorlax se rompe, Ash tiene un gran problema en sus manos, ¿cómo lograrán nuestros héroes que el somnoliento Snorlax sobre una montaña llegue al Centro Pokémon más cercano?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash está ansioso por ganar la última medalla de la Liga Naranja, ¡y pronto prueba un poco de la fuerza de esta Líder de Gimnasio cuando ella le ayuda a eludir otro sigiloso ataque del Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras descubrir el submarino de un científico, los chicos se ven rodeados de la investigación de sus vidas: un banco de Magikarp. Quieren ayudarlo a estudiar la evolución de los Magikarp, pero el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con Ash y Tracey paralizados por el Paralizador de un Vileplume salvaje, ¡depende de Misty encontrar una planta local y salvar a todos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con sus cuatro medallas de la Liga Naranja en la mano, Ash tiene un último desafío por enfrentar antes de ser coronado como Campeón de la Liga Naranja. ¿Tendrá lo que se necesita?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La batalla de Ash por el Trofeo del Ganador de la Liga Naranja continúa, ¡y pronto será evidente que tendrá que enfrentarse a un poderoso Dragonite para convertirse en el Campeón de la Liga Naranja!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tratando de rescatar a un banco local de Lapras de posibles cazadores, nuestros héroes deben hallar una forma de convencer a estos desconfiados Pokémon de que son amigos… ¡antes de que sea demasiado tarde!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con Pueblo Paleta en sus mentes, los chicos buscan un ferry, pero el puerto está abandonado... ¡excepto por unos Electrode explosivos! ¿Podrá Ash detener al Equipo Rocket antes de que el transbordador se llene de humo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash tiene un ajetreado regreso a casa con una sorpresiva visita de un viejo amigo, una visita para ver al Profesor Oak, y un ataque del Equipo Rocket. ¡No hay lugar como el hogar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de que Gary llega al rescate contra el Equipo Rocket, Ash aprovecha la oportunidad… Por fin, nuestro héroe reta a su rival a su primera batalla Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash comienza su viaje por Johto, una región ampliamente inexplorada y poblada por Pokémon nuevos para él y sus amigos.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: De nuevo de viaje, Ash y su Charizard derrotan por completo a una ambiciosa Entrenadora novata llamada Casey. Molesta, huye antes de que Ash pueda consolarla: ¡El momento perfecto para que el Equipo Rocket ataque!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un bosque que está siendo destruido por un furioso Pinsir, Ash debe enlistar la ayuda del Heracross local para proteger su hogar. Pero resulta que estos Pokémon se ven más rudos de lo que actúan…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia Ciudad Violeta , nuestros héroes llegan a un valle donde los Donphan suelen cosechar sus preciosas piedras. No hace falta decir que los villanos del Equipo Rocket no están lejos de ellos.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El bosque puede ser un lugar temible por la noche, ¡especialmente si estás perdido! Nuestros héroes necesitarán algo de ayuda para salir de este embrollo. ¡Hoothoot, al rescate!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su primera parada en una ciudad desde Pueblo New Bark, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a que la compañía de baile de un inseguro Bellossom recupere la confianza y participe en su próxima exhibición.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos llegan a un pueblo acechado por crímenes que imitan a un legendario ladrón maestro. La esperanza del pueblo yace en estos jóvenes Entrenadores... ¿Detendrán a este dúo criminal y a su Meowth cómplice?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando nuestros héroes devuelven a un infeliz Snubbull a su acaudalada Entrenadora, inicia una serie de eventos que cambiarán por siempre la vida del Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Brock descubre a un Stantler herido y asustado en un parque cercano, decide cuidarlo hasta curarlo. Pero con Jessie, James y Meowth tras ellos, ¿podrá mantener al Stantler a salvo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Aún en camino hacia Ciudad Violeta, Ash se encuentra con un Chikorita salvaje y trata de atraparlo. Chikorita demuestra ser un oponente más duro de lo que pensaba, y las cosas sólo empeoran con la llegada del Equipo Rocket…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.desc: Every year, hundreds of wildlife attacks and accidents occur in the pristine waters of the paradise, sunshine state of Florida.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: On the rio Parana in northern Argentina, countless fishermen have been violently pulled into the water by unidentified creatures and some have even mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Morgan's survival hangs on a critical airdrop; gale-force winds threaten to destroy Marty's cabin; Tom finally gets a breakthrough that could end his losing streak.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, Marty Meierotto completes his cabin build just in time for his family to touch down in the Revelation Mountains.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn won't save the world, but she better make her deadline when she hauls a 16-foot-tall Power Ranger to a child's birthday party.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett learns the answer to the question, "Where does the world's largest hog sit?" (anywhere it wants), while hauling a shipment of epic proportions.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: While shipping an 11-foot-tall glass water pipe to the Mile-High City, Marc tries to mellow out after a blown tire threatens to turn this shipment into shards.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: When tasked with hauling the old animatronic band, Rock-A-Fire Explosion, Jenn ends up pulling a Yoko Ono and almost cancels their reunion tour.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Natasha risks profit and time when signals get crossed on the dimensions of a massive radio tower, while Dwight and Tyesha fear becoming the villains after a load of super hero statues get roughed up under their watch.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: As Dwight and Tyesha tangle with an animatronic T-Rex and chop it down to size, Doug bites off more than he can chew when moving a massive backyard Pirate Ship playhouse.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: The first pump-action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six-foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th-century German single-shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War-era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The Thornhill buyers run for cover when a self-help CD gives Roy a new lease on his egomaniacal life.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Excitement runs high as Mississauga plays host to a charity auction of highend storage crates.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart shoot a low-budget commercial for their store during an auction in Toronto.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy's arch-nemesis, auctioneer Patrick Pecker, calls an auction on Weston Road. While Roy seeks to lift the curse, Ursula works her charm. Meanwhile, Bogart reads Paul the riot-shirt, and Rick and Cindy get lost.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Tensions run high between Roy and Ursula at an auction in Thornhill. Roy brings his dog for support and Ursula does her best to ignore them. Paul and Bogart hope their life coach will give them a leg up, and Cindy can't hear a word anyone is saying.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The buyers head to Utopia hoping that the auction lives up to its name. Roy is flush with cash and is not afraid to bribe. Ursula runs afoul of some fowl, Rick and Cindy must atone for their sins, and Paul and Bogart uncover some true dough.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: New buyer Tommy is larger than life and looking for a big score at an auction in Brampton. Roy arrives with an intern, eager to mentor for free labor. Rick and Cindy hedge their bets and Ursula would rather be shopping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy brings noisemakers to an auction in Emery Village but the other buyers aren't feeling it. Rick and Cindy prefer to clown around on their own time. Paul and Bogart boogie with some intergalactic performers, and all Ursula wants is a strong coffee.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: As Rick and Cindy try to give up smoking at an auction in Leslieville, they cope by making sure everyone else suffers right along with them.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul brings Bogart’s two older sisters to an auction in Weston. Poor Bogart.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Nearly all the buyers have it out for each other at an auction in Cedarbrae, ON. Cindy almost comes to blows with Ursula, who takes great pleasure in bidding up Roy, who does his best to give Paul and Bogart the worst advice ever.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy immediately regrets bringing his little brother to an auction in Toronto when all his enemies fall for the charming young man.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Evidence of a possible pirate presence on Oak Island mounts when a treasure chest from the 1700's is revealed and the brothers Lagina get stunning news about a find from the Money Pit's GAL-1 shaft.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: New evidence of a European presence on Oak Island more than a century before the discovery of the Money Pit excites the team, until alarming news threatens to shut down the entire operation.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a gigantic energy draining space organism that threatens the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk becomes involved in an arms race when the Klingons equip a native people with superior weaponry.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise tracks a mysterious SOS to an ancient planet presumed long dead.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Enterprise is sent to planet Ekos to investigate a disappearance of Federation historian John Gill.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise's command crew must thwart an invasion by aliens from another galaxy who plan to conquer this one.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise finds a planet devastated by disease that appears to treat the American flag with great reverence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Starfleet uses the Enterprise to test a new super-sophisticated computer, but it soon develops a mind of its own.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew investigates the disappearance of a ship's crew on a planet that is a modern version of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk must decide whether to thwart or help a traveller from the future sent back to 1960s Earth on a secret mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise pursues a mysterious woman who has abducted Spock's brain.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Captain Kirk becomes increasingly erratic and orders the Enterprise into Romulan space. Here, the ship is captured by a beautiful Romulan commander.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk loses his memory and is proclaimed a God while trapped on a planet whose inhabitants are descended from Northwestern Native Americans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches a Federation colony where the adults have all killed themselves but the children play without care.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Miranda Jones, a telepath who studied mental disciplines on Vulcan, arrives with Ambassador Kolos, a Medusan.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: In order to boost his business and gain respect, Quark lies about killing a Klingon, then winds up forced to marry the dead man's widow.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A deadly secret from Dax's past could mean the end of Jadzia's life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira is kidnapped by the Cardassians, who try to convince her that she is really one of their people.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo tries to convince a young, violent Jem'Hadar that there is more to life than fighting and killing.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A trapped crew fights to save the station from self-destruction when an automated Cardassian security program is accidentally activated.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Dax falls in love with a man who will soon disappear with his planet into another dimension for sixty years.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Wil Riker's renegade duplicate steals the Defiant and attacks Cardassian territory, forcing Sisko to assist Gul Dukat in stopping him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Bajoran celebration on the station serves as the backdrop for an epidemic of inexplicable romantic attractions among the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A transporter accident sends Sisko, Bashir, and Dax three centuries back in time to a crucial point in Earth's history.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Trapped in Earth's past, Sisko must assume a pivotal role in history to try and restore the future.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir must use questionable methods in order to keep Vedek Bareil alive long enough to help bring about a Bajoran peace treaty with Cardassia.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A desperate situation that could cost Kira her life forces Odo to face the depth of his feelings for her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko ignores an ancient Bajoran prophecy of doom in order to undertake a joint scientific venture with the Cardassians.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When the Ferengi leader suddenly decides to abolish his race's greedy ways, Quark is determined to find out the truth behind his actions.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dr. Crusher's fear of losing loved ones becomes real when her worries create an alternate reality.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise enters into orbit around the home planet of their former crew-mate, Tasha Yar, where they encounter her sister.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the head of the Klingon high council passes on, Picard finds himself in the middle of the struggle for the now-vacant position. Meanwhile, Worf re-unites with a past love, only to find he now has a son.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker has to quit his birthday party during a so-far uneventful patrol voyage at the Neutral Zone to head an away team when a Romulan secret base is found on a planet which was believed uninhabited.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Before leaving for Starfleet Academy, Wesley Crusher accompanies Captain Picard on a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As an unknown force drags the Enterprise, Deanna Troi struggles with the loss of her powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data tries to comprehend the complex emotions between O'Brien and Keiko, who are about to be married.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being fired upon by a Cardassian vessel, Picard races against time to find out the facts behind the Cardassian commander's claim that the Federation attacked one of their outposts.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While answering a distress call, Picard finds himself not sure of exactly who he is dealing with, but he's sure he's NOT dealing with the planet's version of The Devil, as she claims to be.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Effects of passing through a wormhole give the Enterprise crew a sense that they were unconscious for more than the thirty seconds they've been led to believe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Commander William Riker has been on an acculturation mission under an alias for months on the Arkonian planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While the Enterprise is in a star-base, Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge gets a very special visitor, brilliant engineering designer Dr. Leah Brahms, who he feels to know almost intimately as a 'hologram version' of herself with 'whom' he bonded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise has finally tracked the missing starship USS Britain. Counselor Deanna Troi senses trouble with the life on board and joins Riker's boarding party.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge and an old friend fight to defeat a parasite that is trying to transform them into another species.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager finds a solution to combat the invader of Borg space.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew must say goodbye to one member of their family just as they are adjusting to a new one.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A close encounter with death teaches Torres the true meaning of honor.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded on a strange planet, Chakotay finds himself in the middle of a deceptive war.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A rescue mission puts Torres and the Doctor in the hands of a psychopathic hologram.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Haunting visions lead Seven of Nine on a quest to rejoin the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew is invaded by an alien race conducting dangerous experiments.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A disruption in the space-time continuum forces the crew to evacuate Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A badly damaged Voyager with a skeleton crew leads an armada of interplanetary ships against them.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A telepathic race arrests Torres for thinking violent thoughts.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: While searching for equipment stolen from Voyager, Janeway gets help from her holodeck mentor, Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When Neelix dies and is brought back to life, he begins to doubt his spiritual beliefs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Nightmares become reality when the crew is attacked in their dreams.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew makes contact with a Starfleet ship in the Alpha Quadrant.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Ronon reconnects with a group of Satedans from his past who enlist the Atlantis team's help on a dangerous mission against the Wraith. But after the Atlantis crew is captured, Ronon is faced with the truth about his old friends’ new loyalties.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an exploratory walk on a jungle planet, Sheppard touches a glowing crystalline growth and becomes host to an infectious energy form. Once on Atlantis, the entity begins to move from person to person, putting the entire crew at risk.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: On his way back to Atlantis, Lt. Col. Sheppard is taken prisoner by a rogue ship helmed by a ruthless human commander with a secret agenda. As the team searches for him, Sheppard's resourcefulness is put to the test as he tries to stay alive.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With Atlantis plagued by an amnesia-causing virus, McKay wakes up with no idea who he is or what is going on. Following instructions from a video he recorded earlier, McKay frees himself and sets out to find the key to unlocking this mystery.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding something beneficial, the crew follows an energy signature that leads them to a mysterious sea of lifeless ships. With no visible signs of danger, the crew set off to take a closer look. But things may not be what they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 responds to a cry for help from a doomed civilization, which promises to give Earthlings access to advanced technology in exchange for supplies that would help them defeat their enemies. But they soon discover that SG-1 may not be helping.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is selected to test the effects of alien-tech wristbands on human wearers, and soon find themselves blessed with spectacular strength and speed. But when they are sent on a mission utilizing these new abilities, they learn a shocking lesson.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a High Priestess from the planet Chulak claims to have a plan that would cripple the Goa'uld, everyone is skeptical. SG-1 must join forces with the Tok'ra in order to put her plan into effect, but a deadly, hidden secret could jeopardize it.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When an SGC soldier under the influence of a Goa'uld mind-control device attempts to assassinate a High Council member, SG-1 must uncover other potential assassins, even amongst themselves, before the president arrives for a crucial Summit meeting!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After a visit to a strange planet in the middle of a geomagnetic storm they find themselves repeating the same day over and over again. The team must utilize their accumulated knowledge to stop the time loop before there are disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 joins forces with a Russian scientist to investigate a rogue Stargate in Siberia, linked to a mysterious water planet. The team must venture via submarine to the water planet, where they encounter an unexpectedly terrifying alien presence.
